title: チューリップ賞の後に・ムカつく！

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm so mad! How could I let Vodka beat me?!
choice_data_list: We'll get even in the Oka Sho.
We'll get even in the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Obviously! That was my plan all along!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She thinks she's better than me. I'll show her just
how wrong she is!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win next time for sure! I will be number one!
